channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Mullin threatens to withhold aid if states do not comply with DHS election directives
item.description: DHS Secretary Markwayne Mullin threatened to strip states of federal election-related aid if they do not comply with the administration's voting roll policies.

item.title: Hazardous wildfire smoke affects more than a dozen states
item.description: Hazardous wildfire smoke is affecting over a dozen states on Saturday, with air quality warnings stretching from the Upper Midwest and Great Lakes to the Northeast.

item.title: U.S. completes seventh consecutive night of strikes on Iran as Strait of Hormuz halts
item.description: An industry analyst says no one is willing to transit the Strait of Hormuz amid escalating U.S.-Iran attacks.

item.title: DOJ says TikTok download ban on federal devices is no longer in effect
item.description: The Justice Department ruled that a federal law prohibiting TikTok on government devices no longer applies to the app.
